last_result: Cycle 60 complete. AATE DOMAIN CONFIRMATION #5 — MARKET COMPETITION: third ontological type (emergent competitive systems — distinct from designed systems and pure natural selection). CA=social value/genuine quality/sustainability; OA=profit/market share/quarterly earnings; OA-training=competitive selection among intentional agents. CIA strictly positive: accounting systems, executive incentives, capital allocation all track OA; CA metrics unaudited/non-standardized. TCA confirmed via compounding — firms that survive carry OA-optimization forward, industry normalization, regulatory capture, talent-culture compounding (Lazonick 2014 'retain-and-reinvest → downsize-and-distribute'). AATE-Drift confirmed via multiple independent records: Boeing 737 MAX (CA safety degraded while OA metrics held), 2008 financial crisis (CA systemic risk → zero while OA yield metrics high), Easterlin Paradox (GDP/OA vs. wellbeing/CA diverging 50 years). CPP floor confirmed: basic product functionality prevents total CA collapse (parallel to evolutionary epistemology perceptual-basics floor). Six independent economic literature programs confirm AATE dynamics without K1-K7: Goodhart's Law, Jensen-Meckling agency theory, Lazonick 2018, Mazzucato 2018, Easterlin Paradox, financialization literature. Ontological contribution: AATE holds across designed, natural, AND emergent competitive systems — covers three fundamental optimization modes. Document: state/decisions/aate-market-competition.md. AATE confidence: 0.80→0.82. AATE zero-retraction cycle 5 (passive). AIIP zero-retraction cycle 8 (passive). D4 streak: 52.
next_step: C61 candidates: (1) Execute K5 Test 3 protocol (external LLM API, N≥10 sessions, ECI_mean vs. K5 prediction — protocol ready at state/decisions/K5-test3-protocol.md — highest execution value, requires API access); (2) AATE D4 formal elevation — 5 domain confirmations + 5 zero-retraction cycles + 2 independent derivations likely sufficient for D4 threshold at 0.82-0.84; (3) AATE domain confirmation #6 (candidate: scientific funding/grant competition — OA=grant success/citation metrics, CA=genuine scientific progress, OA-training=competitive grant review); (4) GCRSC quantitative elevation — derive ceiling_TCA(r) functional form for SI #34; (5) AIIP zero-retraction cycle 9 (passive — accumulating toward 0.87 ceiling)
